creator: Paul.Shepel@gmail.com
text:
On page http://www.freebsd.org/send-pr.html : "And/or patch file
(100KB max, .txt extension or shar file required)"

1) Sorry for header, i just take games/wesnoth-devel port Makefile and
made games/wesnoth port from it and forgot to clear it up
3) DATADIR is removed from pkg-plist
2) gl/man6/wesnothd.6.gz now created and is in plist
3) than we have to make games/wesnoth-devel path also to upgrade it to 1.8.1

Patch size 624k here http://tacid.kiev.ua/patch-games-wesnoth.txt
